name: golang-github-modern-go-reflect2-dev
title: golang-github-modern-go-reflect2-dev
summary: Reflection API without runtime reflect.Value cost
description:
Reflection API without runtime reflect.Value cost
The reflect2 package provides a reflection API that avoids runtime
reflect.Value cost:
.
* reflect get/set interface{}, with type checking
* reflect get/set unsafe.Pointer, without type checking
* reflect2.TypeByName works like Class.forName found in Java
.
This package is designed for low level libraries to optimize reflection
performance. General applications should still use the standard library
reflect.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-modern-go-reflect2-dev because Reflection API without runtime reflect.Value cost.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-modern-go-reflect2-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-modern-go-reflect2-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-modern-go-reflect2-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
